description: Framework v1.3 — web tools (plant.id + HuggingFace model discovery)

new_capabilities_used.run_external_model: Brain autonomously loaded DETR weed detection model from HuggingFace
new_capabilities_used.run_vlm_inference: Brain ran OWLv2 live inference on holdout images
new_capabilities_used.identify_weed: Available but not called by Brain this run (no API key configured)

conclusion: Framework correctly integrates external model discovery. Brain autonomously chose to download and run DETR from HuggingFace. Precision still bottlenecked by label noise.
